title: elaeocarpus parviflorus
intro: Elaeocarpus parviflorus, also known as the Small-flowered Blueberry Ash, is a shrub or small tree native to Australia and New Guinea. The plant has been traditionally used in medicine for its various medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Elaeocarpus parviflorus include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support overall immune function. In traditional medicine, the plant is often prepared as a decoction or infusion for its medicinal properties, and it may also be used in herbal teas and other preparations.
